Dream Cars
programme.desc: German coupes like the Porsche 911, the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 6 series or the Audi RS5 are among the most exciting cars worldwide. With powerful engines, sporty chassis, avant-garde design and advanced technology they embody the desire to drive passionately more than any other cars. DreamCars presents the most beautiful and fastest German coupes.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025
programme.desc: This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: Ferrari Challenge Europe 2025
programme.desc: The "Ferrari Challenge Europe" is an one-make series for Ferraris with seven races across Europe

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Remember the first Beetle? When did Ferdinand Porsche design this 'people's car'? We follow the evolution of the automobile over the last century.

programme.title: Rolex Monterey Motorsports Reunion
programme.desc: The "Rolex Monterey Motorsports Reunion" is an event for historic racecars at Laguna Seca

programme.title: Belcar Endurance Championship 2025
programme.desc: The Belcar Endurance Championship is the top-tier national endurance racing championship in Belgium. The series is sanctioned by the Royal Automobile Club of Belgium and run by Circuit Zolder.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1938 Porsche Typ 64 racing car is a holy grail for many Porsche fans, because itâ€™s the first ever car that is named after Professor Ferdinand Porsche. It is based on Porscheâ€™s so-called Volkswagen and only three examples were ever produced. They were supposed to take part in a race from Berlin through Race, but never did due to World War II. Hamburgâ€™s prototype museum rebuilt the Porsche 64.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The 24 Hours of Le Mans are the toughest race in the world. In 1951 Porsche took part in the 24 hour-classic for the very first time and competed every year ever since. Till 1998 the Porsche enjoyed 16 victories with its prototypes ' more than any other manufacturer in the history of Le Mans. No other brand plays such a decisive role in Le Mans as Porsche.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is a typical family car - heavy, not sporty and sedate. But hardly anyone knows that the Volvo 240T was once a really hot topic on the race track.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Portrait of Sabine Schmitz, a very successful race driver from Germany and the so-called "Queen of the Nordschleife".

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: These two cars open up a new market segment. Bentley treads new paths and presents the first SUV in the 100-year history of the company. With the new Bentayga, Bentley targets customers that already have everything. It's the first luxury SUV on the market and comes with the finest materials and a marvelous V12 engine. Range Rover, however, takes a different approach. With the Evoque Cabriolet, the British brand combines two segments that don't really fit together. Yet if SUVs are driving through the city, it should really be topless.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Corvette, Camaro, Impala â€“ Is there anyone who doesnâ€™t know these dream cars from Chevrolet? Founded Louis Chevrolet, this American brand climbed straight to the top at the turn of the 20th century. Historic photos, spectacular scenes from racing events and interviews with Formula 1 world champion Emerson Fittipaldi and Olympic gold winner Sven Hannawald tell the exciting history of Chevrolet.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025
programme.desc: This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The FIM X-Trial World Championship is an international indoor motorcycle trials championship that features some of the best riders in the world competing in highly technical and challenging obstacle courses. In X-Trial events, riders navigate through a series of sections that include obstacles such as rocks, logs, and other challenging terrain, aiming to complete the course with the fewest penalties.

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2024
programme.desc: The FIM Sidecarcross World Championship is an international motocross racing series featuring sidecar motorcycles. In this championship, a rider and a passenger (the "passenger" often referred to as the "passenger" or "monkey") work together to navigate challenging off-road tracks. The championship typically consists of multiple rounds held at various locations around the world.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
programme.desc: The 2025 season kicks off on Albaida circuit, Spain. Continuing for the fourth year in a row in Sardegnaâ€™s, Tramatza track (Italy) following by S1GP of Germany in St Wendel. From there the action heads to Hungary, new entry of 2025, on Visonta circuit where works will soon begin on the new off-road section and the new sky section. The series shifts to the historic Busca circuit in early September for Grand Prix of Piemonte, then for the first time ever the FIM SuperMoto of Nations will be host in Czech Republic and as is now customary, the Championship ends on October 13th in the famed street circuit of Mettet.

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2025
programme.desc: The FIM EnduroGP World Championship delivers thrilling off-road action, with top riders battling on challenging courses with natural obstacles. A packed schedule showcases skill and excitement.

programme.title: FIM World Motocross Championship 2024
programme.desc: The FIM Motocross World Championship - also known as the MXGP - is the premier championship of motocross racing.

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2025
programme.desc: The FIM X-Trial World Championship is an international indoor motorcycle trials championship that features some of the best riders in the world competing in highly technical and challenging obstacle courses. In X-Trial events, riders navigate through a series of sections that include obstacles such as rocks, logs, and other challenging terrain, aiming to complete the course with the fewest penalties.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Stylish luxury limousines are the perfect cars for long-distance routes, but they can do so much more than just calmly driving hundreds of kilometers. They are muscle packed athletes, craving for maximum speed. The Audi RS7 Performance comes with a 605 hp 4-litre V8 engine, which enables the limousine to reach a speed of more than 300 km h. Plus: A look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Ferrari - the name alone gets your heart racing. Wherever the iconic fire red legend from Maranello is, the car with the jumping horse on its emblem is always at the center of attention. Car History recounts the story of Ferrari, from the very first sports car up to the Ferrari FF, and shows historical footage from the Formula One and interviews with seven times world champion Michael Schumacher.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's DB series is legendary. Each of these cars proudly carries the initials of David Brown, the man who brought new glory to Aston Martin after World War II. With the new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. It replaces the outdated DB 9 from 2004 and is equipped with a 5.2 liter biturbo V12 engine, which was completely developed in-house. For the very first time, the interior features the latest generation Comand Infotainment System, which was developed by Mercedes. The Aston Martin DB 11 is a dream car wholly in line with David Brown's philosophy.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Beetle is not just a car. For many people itâ€™s THE car. Built over 22 million times, it has conquered every continent of the world. Being 60 years old, it tells us more about our century than many history books. Car History features the evolution of the Beetle from the â€œThe Peopleâ€™s Carâ€ in Nazi Germany to the Rally Beetle and the latest New Beetle.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 7-series or the Audi A8; Limousines 'Made in Germany' are famous for their perfection and prestige. They are considered as embodiment of status and they set the standards when it comes to comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and the most luxurious German limousines.

programme.desc: Australian Circuit Boat Racing offers high-speed thrills on the water, where precision and speed decide intense races on demanding courses. Spectacular competitions captivate motorsport fans across Australia.

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.desc: Caution, danger of splashing! Since 1992, the Aquabike World Championship has been the most important racing series in the sport of jet skiing and one of the fastest competitions in water sports. On specially designed race courses or on the high seas, the participants engage in thrilling races in the ski and runabout categories and fascinate with all kinds of stunts on their more than 300 hp jet skis.

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: The "F1H20 World Powerboat Championship" is the worlds' fastest boat racing championship with speeds up to 250 kp h

programme.title: Australian Circuit Boat Racing 2024
programme.desc: Australian Circuit Boat Racing is governed by the Australian Power Boat Association (APBA), which oversees a range of powerboat racing events across the country. The season features various types of races including hydroplanes, outboard races, and the prestigious EC Griffith Cup.

programme.title: P1 Offshore Championship 2024
programme.desc: The P1 Offshore Powerboat Championship promises tightly fought offshore racing with powerboats reaching top speeds of up to 100 miles per hour. Five events are schedules for this season and Motorvision.TV brings you all the thrilling action from each event!

programme.title: P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship 2024
programme.desc: The P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship typically features high-performance powerboats competing in offshore races, often in challenging conditions. The championship attracts professional teams and drivers from around the world, and it's known for its thrilling and competitive races.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: What do men dream of at night? Do they dream of V8 or V10 engines, aggressive bulls or rearing horses, Lamborghini or Ferrari? Supercars has both of them and speeds up with the cabriolets amongst the supercars. Lamborghini HuracÃ¡n Spyder and Ferrari 488 Spider do not just look good; Once they unleash their 610 and 670 horses, there is no stopping.

Car History reveals how the race-car D-Type lead to the development of what many consider the most beautiful sports car of the world. We also highlight the success that the Jaguar E-Type enjoyed in motor sports.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's DB series is legendary. Each of these cars proudly carries the initials of David Brown, the man who brought new glory to Aston Martin after World War II. With the new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. It replaces the outdated DB 9 from 2004 and is equipped with a 5.2 liter biturbo V12 engine, which was completely developed in-house. For the very first time, the interior features the latest generation Comand Infotainment System, which was developed by Mercedes. The Aston Martin DB 11 is a dream car wholly in line with David Brown's philosophy.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Beetle is not just a car. For many people itâ€™s THE car. Built over 22 million times, it has conquered every continent of the world. Being 60 years old, it tells us more about our century than many history books. Car History features the evolution of the Beetle from the â€œThe Peopleâ€™s Carâ€ in Nazi Germany to the Rally Beetle and the latest New Beetle.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 7-series or the Audi A8; Limousines 'Made in Germany' are famous for their perfection and prestige. They are considered as embodiment of status and they set the standards when it comes to comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and the most luxurious German limousines.

programme.title: Supercars

It's timelessly elegant, is equipped with an 180 hp engine and usually still more cruiser than a sports device. When the Rolls Royce Dawn opens its top at dawn, it also opens a new chapter in the success story of Rolls Royce. With a basic price of 330.000 Euros, it's the ultimate status symbol. Two supercars as different as day and night.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Since the '50s the Mercedes SL has been considered as the ultimate sports car legend. Starting with the legendary gull-winged 300SL, the SL series has always been all about innovation and sophisticated sportiness. The abbreviation SL means super lightweight, though these days it stands more for super luxury. Car History takes you on a ride through the history of the SL series.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Jaguar F-Type, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage or the Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive. English roadsters show more sportsmanship than all the other cars and enjoy cult status all over the world. The fun with open and fast two-seaters was invented in England after all. DreamCars presents the most breathtaking English cabriolets of all time.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These EVs want to prove the opposite! The VW ID. Buzz GTX enters the ring with all-wheel drive and 340 horsepower. But how sporty is it really? And this one isnâ€™t even an EVâ€”at least, thatâ€™s how itâ€™s supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N tricks you into thinking youâ€™re sitting in a high-performance gas car. Weâ€™ll reveal exactly how that works.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: SUVs are selling like hotcakes. Over 50% market share in Europe in 2024 â€“ a record! Compact SUVs are especially popular, and the Dacia Bigster is really shaking up the segment. Around 10,000 Euros cheaper than the competition, itâ€™s a clear challenge. But is it truly good, or just cheap with nothing behind it? Plus: five exciting facts about the brand-new third generation of the Audi Q3.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: The Fiat 500X, the SUV version of the hugely popular 500, is built in Melfi in southern Italy. The production plant is one of the most modern facilities in Europe. The FCA Company has invested almost a billion Euros into the expansion. Up to 1600 cars leave the assembly line every day. Made in Italy - Fiat provides an insight into the manufacturing facilities of the oldest and biggest Italian carmaker.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Honda Africa Twin is back. The austere name CRF1000L represents nothing less than the rebirth of a legend. In the 90s the versatile Honda was seen as the perfect companion for a trip around the world or through extreme terrain. Now, it not only rivals long-distance enduros from BMW and KTM, but also goes its own way with off-road capabilities. Harley-Davidson breaks new ground with the Sport Glide as well. The Sport Glide is their new all-rounder and is both a touring bike as well as a naked curiser.

programme.title: Special
programme.desc: In 2023, the Geneva International Motor Show takes place in Qatar for the very first time, promising to be a unique spectacle. An automotive festival that spans multiple parts of the country â€“ from the racetrack to the desert. Not only new vehicles but also unique classics are showcased. We present highlights such as the Lamborghini Revuelto and the Delage D12.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Stylish luxury limousines are the perfect cars for long-distance routes, but they can do so much more than just calmly driving hundreds of kilometers. They are muscle packed athletes, craving for maximum speed. The Audi RS7 Performance comes with a 605 hp 4-litre V8 engine, which enables the limousine to reach a speed of more than 300 km h. Plus: A look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Ferrari - the name alone gets your heart racing. Wherever the iconic fire red legend from Maranello is, the car with the jumping horse on its emblem is always at the center of attention. Car History recounts the story of Ferrari, from the very first sports car up to the Ferrari FF, and shows historical footage from the Formula One and interviews with seven times world champion Michael Schumacher.

programme.desc: German coupes like the Porsche 911, the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 6 series or the Audi RS5 are among the most exciting cars worldwide. programme.desc: LaLiga FC Futures: Real Betis vs PSG. Real Betis fokus pada pengembangan teknik dan kreativitas, sedangkan PSG menghadirkan talenta muda dengan fisik kuat dan kemampuan individu menonjol. Duel ini menjadi ajang pembuktian bintang masa depan.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: ATM Vs BET

programme.title: Asian Le Mans Series HL 2025/26
programme.desc: Asian Le Mans Series HL 2025/26 menampilkan balapan cepat, tantangan ketahanan, strategi pit, dan finis mendebarkan.

programme.title: Asian Le Mans Series HL 2025/26
programme.desc: Asian Le Mans Series HL 2025/26 menampilkan balapan cepat, tantangan ketahanan, strategi pit, dan finis mendebarkan.

programme.title: LaLiga 2 2025/26: CAD Vs ALM
programme.desc: LaLiga 2 2025/26: Cadiz vs Almeria. Cadiz dikenal dengan pertahanan disiplin dan dukungan kuat suporter kandang, sementara Almeria mengandalkan kecepatan serangan serta pengalaman dari level tertinggi. Laga ini penting untuk menjaga peluang promosi sejak awal musim.

programme.title: LaLiga Highlights 2025/26
programme.desc: Dari gol-gol spektakuler, penyelamatan gemilang kiper, hingga duel sengit antar tim papan atas, program ini memberikan gambaran lengkap tentang kejutan, persaingan ketat, dan kisah inspiratif sepanjang musim.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Magazine Show
programme.desc: Program televisi yang menyajikan liputan mendalam tentang Kejuaraan Dunia Reli FIA (WRC), termasuk wawancara dengan pembalap, tim, dan tokoh penting dari berbagai reli di seluruh dunia.

programme.title: Mini Match UEL: LIL Vs SCF
programme.desc: Mini Match UEL: Lille vs SC Freiburg. Lille menampilkan permainan teknis khas Prancis dengan transisi cepat, sedangkan Freiburg mengandalkan kekuatan fisik dan disiplin taktik. Pertandingan ini menyajikan duel gaya bermain berbeda di ajang Europa League.

programme.title: LaLiga FC Futures: ATM Vs PSG
programme.desc: LaLiga FC Futures: Atletico Madrid vs PSG. Tim muda Atletico Madrid menonjolkan intensitas dan kerja sama tim, sementara PSG menghadirkan talenta muda dengan kreativitas dan skill individu. Laga ini menjadi panggung calon bintang masa depan.

programme.title: LaLiga FC Futures: SEV Vs INT
programme.desc: LaLiga FC Futures: Sevilla vs Inter Milan. Akademi Sevilla terkenal dengan teknik tinggi dan pemahaman taktik, sedangkan Inter Milan mengandalkan keseimbangan fisik dan permainan terstruktur. Duel bergengsi antar dua akademi ternama Eropa.

programme.title: LaLiga FC Futures: JUV Vs RMA
programme.desc: LaLiga FC Futures, pertandingan antara JUV berhadapan dengan RMA

programme.title: LaLiga FC Futures: BAR Vs SPO
programme.desc: LaLiga FC Futures: Barcelona vs Sporting CP. Filosofi permainan Barcelona menitikberatkan penguasaan bola dan kreativitas, sementara Sporting CP dikenal sebagai penghasil penyerang bertalenta. Pertandingan ini menampilkan kualitas pembinaan sepak bola usia muda terbaik.

programme.title: Super Lig 2025/26: BJK Vs ALA
programme.desc: Super Lig 2025/26: Beşiktaş vs Alanyaspor. Beşiktaş tampil sebagai salah satu klub besar Turki dengan sejarah panjang, dukungan suporter yang kuat, serta kekuatan lini pertahanan dan pengalaman pemain di level tertinggi. Di sisi lain, Alanyaspor hadir sebagai tim yang solid dengan permainan cepat dan semangat untuk memberi kejutan kepada tim papan atas. Laga ini diprediksi berlangsung sengit karena kedua tim sama-sama memburu poin penting di kompetisi Super Lig Turki.

programme.title: Mini Match LaLiga: BAR Vs MLL
programme.desc: Pertandingan LaLiga 2024/25 antara FC Barcelona dan RCD Mallorca.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: SEV Vs GIR
programme.desc: LaLiga 2025/26: SEV vs GIR. Kedua tim bersaing menjaga momentum liga, mempertemukan pengalaman Sevilla dengan gaya menyerang dinamis Girona.

programme.title: LFCTV 2025/26: SUN Vs LIV
programme.desc: LFCTV 2025/26: Sunderland vs Liverpool. Sunderland berusaha tampil agresif dengan semangat kandang, sementara Liverpool hadir dengan kualitas elit, pressing ketat, dan kedalaman skuad menyerang. Pertemuan antara semangat juang dan ambisi juara.

programme.title: LFC Trending 2025/26, Ep 27
programme.desc: LFC Trending 2025/26 – Episode 27. Episode ini membahas cerita terkini, pemain sorotan, dan momen yang sedang tren seputar Liverpool FC sepanjang musim.

programme.title: LFCTV Specials 2025/26
programme.desc: LFCTV Specials 2024/25 menyajikan berbagai konten eksklusif yang menggali sisi lain dari Liverpool FC, baik di dalam maupun di luar lapangan.

programme.title: Formula 1 Aramco Pre-Season 2026 - Day 2
programme.desc: Formula 1 Aramco Pre-Season 2026 – Day 2. Tim-tim memaksimalkan simulasi balapan, penyempurnaan setelan, dan uji ketahanan mobil. Para pembalap mulai meningkatkan kecepatan untuk memberi data penting jelang musim baru Formula 1.

programme.title: Judo For The World S1, Ep 1

programme.title: Judo For The World S1, Ep 1
programme.desc: Judo for the World menampilkan para kompetitor terbaik dalam olahraga ini saat mereka bertanding dalam tur global untuk memperebutkan emas di Kejuaraan Judo Dunia. programme.title: FS MMA: Lee Vs Calanoc
programme.desc: Pertarungan FS MMA antara Lee dan Calanoc berlangsung sengit dengan intensitas tinggi sejak ronde pertama.

programme.title: WCCB: Huck Vs Garay
programme.desc: Dengan Kejuaraan Dunia Kelas Penjelajah WBO dipertaruhkan, pemegang gelar Marco Huck (33-1) akan mempertahankan gelarnya melawan penantang veteran Hugo Garay (34-6) di Olympia Eissportzentrum, Munich, Jerman. Huck, yang berlaga di negara asalnya, akan mempertahankan gelarnya untuk ketujuh kalinya secara beruntun. Garay, asal Argentina, baru-baru ini memegang gelar Juara Dunia Kelas Berat Ringan WBA dan meraih kemenangan atas petarung Jerman Juergen Braehmer, dan kini ingin naik kelas dan merebut gelar di Kelas Penjelajah. Jangan lewatkan Huck-Garay, hanya di FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Greatest Classics S1, Ep 2
programme.desc: Setelah sepuluh tahun tidak bertanding, "Big" George Foreman kembali ke ring tinju pada bulan Maret 1987. Meskipun para kritikus mengatakan bahwa ia terlalu tua untuk bertarung secara serius di Kejuaraan Dunia lainnya, Foreman mulai meraih serangkaian kemenangan yang pada akhirnya menarik perhatian dunia.

programme.title: Knockouts!: Morales Vs Maidana
programme.desc: Pertandingan utama dalam episode ini adalah perebutan gelar juara sementara kelas welter ringan WBA antara Erik Morales dan Marcos Maidana, yang memberikan kesempatan bagi Maidana untuk kembali ke kancah perebutan gelar tinju, sementara Morales memberikan penampilan klasik bagi para penggemar. Juga ada aksi dari juara kelas welter WBO, Carlos Quintanta.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S19, Ep 3
programme.desc: Untuk pertama kalinya, para kompetitor sumo peringkat teratas di dunia ditampilkan dalam sebuah serial penuh aksi, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Format baru ini menyajikan Sumo secara otentik, mendalam dan menghibur yang mencakup peraturan, peringkat, pertandingan, dan banyak lagi. Pertunjukan 3 menampilkan Hakuho, Ichinojo, Takakeisho dan Kakuryu dari basho Haru, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World Of Fights S3, Ep 17
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights menyajikan semua gaya bertarung dari seluruh dunia dalam satu acara!

programme.title: MMA 30 S1, Ep 6
programme.desc: Episode ini menampilkan pertarungan ulang antara dua petarung flyweight wanita: Claire Guthrie dari tim Julianna Peña dan Juliana Miller dari tim Amanda Nunes.
